creator: crazyalexnt@inbox.ru
text:
When you open the zip file, mc looking unzip down the wrong path / usr / bin.
Receive a message that it is impossible to find unzip.
It seems to zip the same situation.

Fix: 

mc-4.7.2/configure
mc-4.7.2/m4.include/vfs/mc-vfs-extfs.m4

In these files the wrong way, or to correct manually or write a simple patch.
How-To-Repeat: Start the mc and try to open them zip file by clicking on it enter.
